en: Stop it. Stop what? You're talking about me and Morse code.
You know what? Joke's on you, because I know Morse code. Ha!
ko: 너는 나와 모스 부호에 대해 이야기하고 있어. 알지? 너는 속았어, 왜냐하면 나는 모스 부호를 알아.

en: Yeah, that's what we're doing. In our very limited free time and with our very limited budget, we went and got a nanny,
and then we went out and took a class on a very outmoded and very unnecessary form of communication
ko: 그리고 나서 우리는 수업을 들으러 갔어.

en: just so we could talk about you in front of you.
ko: 너에 대해 너 앞에서 이야기하기 위해서.

en: Yep, that's exactly what we did. It all started when Dwight was tapping his foot
ko: 맞아. 우리가 한 일이 바로 그거야.

en: against the leg of his desk. When I asked him to stop, he said, I will when you lose the baby weight.
ko: 내가 그만하라고 했을 때, 그는 이렇게 말했어,

en: Very well. I must have imagined it. I apologize.
